Game.Name: Mario to Wario (Japan) (En)
Game.plot: Mario and Wario is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Game Freak and published by Nintendo,which was released in Japan in 1993.Cheat: Unlock Secret LevelsComplete all thirteen worlds, watch the ending and you will get extra levels. Cheat: Unlock Secret LevelsJust complete the secret World 9 (Flower Fields) and World 10 will appear where World 9 was.Make sure you've got lots of lives though,because this world's a killer!Cheat: Unlock Secret LevelsJust complete World 8 (Desert),and,where usually ''Level Select'' is (With Wario's head at it),World 9 will appear
